result.title: 商城业务排除客户和排除店铺，满立减叠加
result.error_message: [SKI313] 关键字 'evaluate' 重试 1 次后仍失败: [SKI302] JavaScript 执行失败: Page.evaluate: Error: code input not found in modal for C0012278 at fillModal (eval at evaluate (:234:30), <anonymous>:117:21) at addCode (eval at evaluate (:234:30), <anonymous>:148:16) at async configureCombo (eval at evaluate (:234:30), <anonymous>:150:799) at async eval (eval at evaluate (:234:30), <anonymous>:157:8) at async <anonymous>:260:30 keyword: evaluate
